title: coelandria coccinea
intro: Coelandria coccinea, also known as the Red Coelandria, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coelandria coccinea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Coelandria coccinea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
